description: Directed service dependency graph. An edge {from: A, to: B} means A calls B. The `node` field is the k8s node a service's pods run on. platform-api depends on olapdb-server, which dispatches write/commit work to the olapdb-vw-write virtual warehouse.

edges.note: dispatches write/commit queries to the write virtual warehouse

note: Request flow A->B. The write VW pod (olapdb-vw-write) runs on node ip-10-0-37-15. When that node hits MemoryPressure and the kubelet evicts the pod, the failure enters the service graph at olapdb-vw-write, then propagates callee->caller up to olapdb-server and platform-api. olapdb-vw-default (read VW) is on a different node and stays healthy.
